# WPShadow GitHub Milestones

Create these milestones in your repo (Settings > Milestones):

---

## CURRENT (Q1 2026)

### Phase 3.5: Code Quality
- **Due Date:** January 31, 2026
- **Description:** DRY refactoring, base class migrations, 31% duplicate code reduction
- **Status:** IN PROGRESS
- **Target:** Complete code quality audit and refactor

### Phase 4: Dashboard Excellence  
- **Due Date:** February 28, 2026
- **Description:** Real-time gauge system, improved UX, workflow visualization
- **Status:** NEXT
- **Target:** 5 new dashboard components

---

## UPCOMING (Q1-Q2 2026)

### Phase 5: Academy & Training
- **Due Date:** March 31, 2026
- **Description:** Knowledge base integration, training videos for all diagnostics
- **Status:** PLANNED
- **Target:** 57 KB articles + video links

### Phase 6: Privacy & Compliance
- **Due Date:** April 30, 2026
- **Description:** GDPR compliance, consent system, transparency improvements
- **Status:** PLANNED
- **Target:** Full compliance framework

### Phase 7: Guardian Cloud
- **Due Date:** June 30, 2026
- **Description:** Cloud scanning, real-time monitoring, cross-site dashboard
- **Status:** PLANNED
- **Target:** MVP cloud integration

---

## FUTURE (Q2-Q4 2026)

### Phase 8: Gamification
- **Due Date:** September 30, 2026
- **Description:** Points, badges, achievements for site improvements
- **Status:** PLANNED
- **Target:** Full gamification system

### Phase 9: WPShadow Vault
- **Due Date:** December 31, 2026
- **Description:** Secure credential storage and recovery
- **Status:** PLANNED
- **Target:** Production-ready vault

---

## ONGOING

### WPShadow Pro
- **Description:** Continuous Pro module development and maintenance
- **Status:** ACTIVE
- **Target:** Monthly releases with new diagnostic stubs and personas

### v1.x Bug Fixes
- **Description:** Maintenance releases and critical bug fixes

- **Target:** Same-week response to critical bugs
